title: New Booking System Coming Soon – Keep An Eye On Your Email
excerpt: In order to accommodate our new booking rules, we will be transitioning over to new booking software over the next month. Although we expect to run into some growing pains over the coming months, we hope to integrate it more directly with our website to provide a better user experience, and also provide a more mobile-friendly view … Read more
content:
In order to accommodate our new booking rules, we will be transitioning over to new booking software over the next month. Although we expect to run into some growing pains over the coming months, we hope to integrate it more directly with our website to provide a better user experience, and also provide a more mobile-friendly view for on-the-go bookings.

Billings are not yet enabled for this system, so we will continue to run our transactions through our legacy software, and include a link for you to access all of your payment receipts from our website.

Please keep a careful eye on your email for new updates about this, as any bookings made through our legacy system will no longer be valid once we make the switch.
